recommendedPatterns: Webhook node with production URL and explicit response mode
Respond to Webhook for controlled acknowledgements
Use stable external IDs for idempotency
Use fast responses and move heavy work to downstream steps

twenty.role: crm follow-up and workflow-native record management
recommendedPatterns: People, Companies, Opportunities, Notes, and Tasks as the core follow-up model
Record is Created or Updated for manual-record safety
Upsert Record when match keys are stable
Search Records before Update Record when the target is not already identified
Use workflow forms only for manual trigger workflows
Use environment-specific and versioned workflows
Use subscribers with metadata and preferences
Use topics for group fan-out
Duplicate or create from template instead of rebuilding workflows from scratch
Create reusable event types first
Use routing forms to screen and route bookers
Use booking webhooks for downstream automation
Use event-type or organization-level webhook scope deliberately

documenso.role: templates, direct links, and signed-document lifecycle
recommendedPatterns: Use templates as the reusable consent primitive
Use direct links when the recipient is not known in advance
Use API-created signing when the recipient is already known
Provision a signing certificate for self-hosted instances

recommendedLanes.name: Intake to CRM to notification
recommendedLanes.purpose: Contact, referral, partner, and triage intake.
actions: Notify a topic or subscriber set in Novu

recommendedLanes.name: Consent-first onboarding
recommendedLanes.purpose: Send reusable agreements or consent forms before the next step.
actions: Issue a Documenso direct link or signing token

recommendedLanes.name: Scheduling qualification
recommendedLanes.purpose: Ask screening questions before booking the right slot.
actions: Route to the correct event type or team member
Update CRM stage and owner task

recommendedLanes.name: Reminder ladder
recommendedLanes.purpose: Reduce no-shows and complete consent or onboarding.
actions: Check for overdue tasks or missing completion events
Escalate through n8n after delay if still incomplete
Update record stage or owner if needed

defaultGuidance: Prefer reusable templates over one-off documents or notifications.
Prefer upsert and stable keys over create-only writes.
Prefer routing before booking when qualification matters.
Prefer topics for group notifications and subscriber IDs for individual notifications.
Keep webhook responses explicit and fast.
